title: Header navigation: Home to Menu via nav link
description: Verifies the persistent header shows navigation links and can navigate from Home to Menu.

steps.description: Verify element "site navigation header" is visible
Click on "Menu" in the navigation header

title: Header navigation: Menu to Events via nav link
description: Verifies navigation between two inner pages using the header links.

steps.description: Verify element "site navigation header" is visible
Click on "Events" in the navigation header

title: Header navigation: Home to Gallery via nav link
description: Verifies the Gallery link in the header navigates to the Gallery page.

steps.description: Click on "Gallery" in the navigation header

title: Language toggle switches navigation labels and page content (EN/ES)
description: Verifies the language toggle changes visible UI text, including navigation labels and page text.

steps.description: Click on the language toggle button

title: Navigation header persists across page transitions
description: Verifies the navigation header remains visible after navigating between pages.

steps.description: Verify element "site navigation header" is visible
Click on "Contact" in the navigation header
Verify element "site navigation header" is visible

title: Home loads and hero section is visible
description: Verifies the home page renders and displays the hero restaurant name and tagline.

steps.description: Verify element "Make a Reservation" is visible

title: Home CTA: Make a Reservation navigates to Reservations page
description: Verifies clicking the Make a Reservation CTA from the home page loads the reservations page.

title: Home CTA: View Menu navigates to Menu page
description: Verifies clicking the View Menu CTA from the home page loads the menu page.

title: Scroll reveals menu highlights section
description: Verifies scrolling down the home page reveals the menu highlights preview section.

steps.description: Verify element "menu item highlight" is visible

title: Scroll reveals events preview section
description: Verifies scrolling down the home page reveals the events preview section.

title: Footer shows contact and hours information
description: Verifies the home page footer displays contact details and hours section content.

title: View Starters category items from category tabs/filters
description: Verifies a user can switch to the Starters category and see the corresponding items list.

steps.description: Verify element "Menu items list" is visible
Verify element "Starters section heading" is visible

title: Menu item card shows required fields (name, description, price, thumbnail)
description: Verifies a visible menu item displays name, description, price, and a thumbnail image.

steps.description: Verify element "Menu items list" is visible
Verify element "Item thumbnail image" is visible

title: Switch to Drinks category and browse items
description: Verifies a user can switch to the Drinks category and see drink items.

steps.description: Verify element "Menu items list" is visible
Verify element "Drinks section heading" is visible

title: Drinks thumbnail click enlarges image or opens modal (if supported)
description: Verifies clicking a drink item thumbnail shows a larger image view when the UI supports it.

steps.description: Verify element "Item thumbnail image" is visible
Verify element "Enlarged image or image modal" is visible
Verify element "Enlarged image or image modal" is not visible

title: Menu page renders populated items when data loads successfully
description: Verifies the menu page shows a populated list of items after loading completes.

steps.description: Verify element "Menu items list" is visible
Verify element "At least one menu item" is visible

title: View Events page and verify upcoming events list shows key summary fields
description: Verifies that the Events page renders a list of upcoming events with visible photo/thumbnail, title, and date information when events exist.

steps.description: Verify an element "Event title" is visible
Verify an element "Event date" is visible

title: Scroll to an event item and verify description and date/time are visible
description: Verifies that an event’s description and date/time details are visible when the user scrolls to an event item.

steps.description: Scroll to an event item further down the page
Verify an element "Event description" is visible
Verify an element "Event date/time" is visible

title: Verify events are populated after data load (Supabase fetch)
description: Verifies that events appear after the page has had time to load data and render the listing.

steps.description: Wait for element "Event item" to appear
Verify an element "Event item" is visible
Verify an element "Event title" is visible
Verify an element "Event date" is visible

title: Handle empty state: no upcoming events message is shown
description: Verifies the page shows a friendly empty-state message when there are no upcoming events.

steps.description: Wait for text "No upcoming events" to appear
Verify text "No upcoming events" is visible

title: Verify event card shows photo/thumbnail when available
description: Verifies that at least one event displays a visible image/thumbnail if the event has a photo configured.

steps.description: Scroll to an event item that appears to include a photo
Verify an element "Event title" is visible

title: Gallery page loads and shows a grid of photos
description: Verifies the gallery page renders and displays a visible grid/list of images.

steps.description: Verify element "at least one gallery image" is visible

title: Open a gallery image to view it larger (modal/lightbox if available)
description: Verifies clicking an image opens a larger view when the feature is implemented.

steps.description: Verify element "at least one gallery image" is visible
Verify element "larger image view or modal" is visible

title: Gallery page works when images load slowly (progressive appearance)
description: Verifies the page remains usable and images appear without breaking layout as they load.

steps.description: Verify element "at least one gallery image" is visible
Wait for "additional gallery images" to appear
Verify element "multiple gallery images" is visible

title: Gallery page has no broken empty state on initial render
description: Verifies the gallery does not show an error-only or empty-only screen during normal load.

steps.description: Verify text "No images" is not visible

title: Gallery page navigation is accessible from the Home page
description: Verifies users can reach the gallery via on-site navigation rather than direct URL entry.

steps.description: Click on "Gallery" in the site navigation

title: Access About page and view core story content
description: Verifies the About page loads and displays the restaurant story and team/ownership information.

steps.description: Verify element "Team" section heading is visible

title: Reach About page from Home navigation
description: Verifies a user can navigate to the About page using site navigation and sees About content.

steps.description: Click on "About" in the site header navigation

title: Scroll to Team section and view team photos/bios
description: Verifies the Team section is reachable by scrolling and team photos and bios are visible.

steps.description: Verify element "Team" section heading is visible
Verify element "Team" bio/description text is visible

title: Team section content remains visible after additional scroll
description: Verifies team photos and bios remain present and readable after moving within the Team area.

steps.description: Scroll down within the Team section content
Verify element "Team" bio/description text is visible

title: About page key headings render without blank sections
description: Verifies the About page does not render as an empty/blank page and has expected section headings.

steps.description: Verify element "About" main heading is visible
Verify element "Our Story" section heading is visible
Verify element "Team" section heading is visible
Verify text "Try again" is not visible

title: Submit contact form successfully with valid inputs
description: Verifies a customer can submit the contact form with valid Name, Email, and Message and see a success confirmation.

steps.description: Type "Test Customer" into the Name field
Type "Hello, I have a question about your menu options." into the Message field
Verify a success message confirming submission is visible

title: Required field validation: missing Email shows validation error
description: Verifies the form blocks submission when Email is empty and shows a required-field validation message.

steps.description: Type "Test Customer" into the Name field
Type "I am reaching out but forgot to include my email." into the Message field
Verify a validation error for the Email field is visible

title: Field persistence after validation error (Email missing)
description: Verifies that when submission is blocked by missing Email, previously entered Name and Message remain visible for correction.

steps.description: Type "Persistent User" into the Name field
Type "Please confirm whether my previous entries remain after a validation error." into the Message field
Verify a validation error for the Email field is visible
Verify text "Please confirm whether my previous entries remain after a validation error." is visible

title: Invalid email format shows validation error
description: Verifies the form rejects an obviously invalid email format and displays an email validation message.

steps.description: Type "Format Checker" into the Name field
Type "Testing invalid email format handling." into the Message field
Verify a validation error for the Email field is visible

title: Message required validation (leave Message empty)
description: Verifies the form blocks submission when Message is empty and shows a required-field validation message.

steps.description: Type "No Message User" into the Name field
Verify a validation error for the Message field is visible

title: Submit button prevents duplicate submission while request is in progress
description: Verifies the UI provides visible feedback that submission is in progress and prevents immediate re-submission.

steps.description: Type "Double Submit" into the Name field
Type "Testing that the form does not allow duplicate submissions while processing." into the Message field
Verify a visible submitting indicator or disabled submit state is shown

title: Submit a reservation request successfully with all required fields
description: Verifies a user can complete the reservation form and see a confirmation message after submitting valid details.

steps.description: Type "Alex Rivera" into the Name field
Select a valid future Date from the Date picker
Select a valid Time from the Time selector
Type "4" into the Party Size field
Verify a confirmation message is visible

title: Show email validation error when email format is invalid
description: Verifies the reservation form blocks submission and shows a visible validation error for an invalid email format.

steps.description: Type "Jamie Lopez" into the Name field

title: Prevent submission when required fields are missing (empty submit)
description: Verifies the form shows visible required-field validation when submitting without filling mandatory fields.

title: Allow optional special requests and still submit successfully
description: Verifies adding special requests does not block submission and the user still receives a confirmation message.

steps.description: Type "Taylor Martinez" into the Name field
Select a valid future Date from the Date picker
Select a valid Time from the Time selector
Type "2" into the Party Size field
Type "Window seat if available" into the Special Requests field
Verify a confirmation message is visible

title: Party size rejects non-numeric input
description: Verifies the party size field does not accept non-numeric input or shows a visible validation message when invalid.

steps.description: Type "Casey Nguyen" into the Name field
Type "four" into the Party Size field

title: Party size rejects zero or negative values
description: Verifies the form blocks submission and shows a visible error when party size is zero or negative.

steps.description: Type "Riley Santos" into the Name field
Select a valid future Date from the Date picker
Select a valid Time from the Time selector
Type "0" into the Party Size field

title: Home page language toggle switches visible UI copy between EN and ES
description: Verifies the navigation language toggle updates the Home page visible text to the selected language.

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on the "EN" option in the language toggle

title: Menu page language toggle updates category names and labels
description: Verifies the language toggle changes visible menu UI labels and category names on the Menu page.

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on the "EN" option in the language toggle

title: Events page language toggle updates page heading text
description: Verifies that switching language updates visible text on another top-level page (Events).

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on the "EN" option in the language toggle

title: Contact page language toggle updates form labels
description: Verifies language switching updates visible Contact page form labels and headings.

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on the "EN" option in the language toggle

title: Reservations page language toggle updates reservation form copy
description: Verifies language switching updates visible text on the Reservations page including the page heading.

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on the "EN" option in the language toggle

title: Language selection remains consistent when navigating from Home to Menu via UI links
description: Verifies the selected language carries over when navigating to another page using in-app navigation (not direct URL navigation).

steps.description: Click on the "ES" option in the language toggle
Click on "Menu" in the main navigation

title: Open Admin dashboard and navigate to Menu Items management
description: Verifies that the admin dashboard loads and the Menu Items card navigates to the menu management page.

steps.description: Verify text "Add New Item" is visible

title: Admin Menu: add a new menu item without image (skip upload)
description: Verifies a user can create a new menu item using text fields and category selection, and it appears in the list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Test Item" into the "Name" field
Type "Created by automated UI test" into the "Description" field
Verify text "E2E Test Item" is visible

title: Admin Menu: edit an existing menu item and save changes
description: Verifies an existing menu item can be opened, edited (e.g., price), saved, and the updated value is visible in the list.

steps.description: Verify text "Add New Item" is visible
Click on the first menu item in the list

title: Admin Menu: toggle availability for an item
description: Verifies the availability toggle can be changed and the UI reflects the updated availability state.

steps.description: Verify text "Add New Item" is visible
Click on the availability toggle for the first menu item
Click on the availability toggle for the same menu item

title: Admin Menu: validation error when Price is missing
description: Verifies required field validation prevents saving when Price is empty and shows an error message.

steps.description: Type "Missing Price Item" into the "Name" field
Type "This should not save" into the "Description" field

title: Open Admin dashboard and navigate to Events management
description: Verifies that the admin dashboard loads and the Events card navigates to the events management page.

title: Admin Events: create a new event without image (skip upload)
description: Verifies a user can create a new event with title, date, and description and it appears in the list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Test Event" into the "Title" field
Type "Created by automated UI test" into the "Description" field
Verify text "E2E Test Event" is visible

title: Admin Events: delete an event and confirm removal
description: Verifies an event can be deleted via the UI confirmation and is removed from the list.

steps.description: Click on "Delete" for the first event in the list
